seo.metaTitle: White-Label Email Marketing Platform for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Add AI-powered email marketing to your digital portfolio. Hostopia's white-label platform lets telcos, ISPs, and MSPs drive SMB engagement and recurring revenue.

hero.headline: White-Label Email Marketing That Drives Revenue
hero.stat: $36 return for every $1 spent — highest ROI digital channel
hero.subheadline: Your SMB customers need email marketing. The question is whether they get it from you — or from a tool that has no connection to your brand.
hero.description: Hostopia puts an AI-powered campaign platform in their hands, under your logo — turning email into a recurring revenue stream you control.
hero.badge: AI-powered email campaigns, branded as yours

items.title: Create campaigns in minutes
items.body: AI generates professional email copy, images, and layouts tailored to their business type.

items.title: Automate engagement
items.body: Welcome sequences, promotions, and re-engagement flows run automatically.

items.title: Grow their audience
items.body: Embeddable signup forms and list management turn website visitors into subscribers.

items.title: See what's working
items.body: Opens, clicks, and conversion analytics give visibility into campaign performance.

features.heading: Everything Your SMBs Need — Under Your Brand
features.intro: Hostopia handles the technology. You own the customer experience.

cards.title: AI-Powered Campaign Builder
cards.body: Customers create professional emails in minutes using AI-generated copy, images, and layouts tailored to their business type. No design skills required.

cards.title: Smart Segmentation & Automation
cards.body: Automated workflows and audience segmentation deliver the right message at the right time — welcome sequences, promotions, re-engagement flows.

cards.title: Drag-and-Drop Editor
cards.body: Mobile-responsive templates plus custom HTML support. Simplicity for beginners, full creative control for advanced users.

cards.title: Contact & List Management
cards.body: Built-in subscriber forms and list management connect to their website, turning visitors into contacts automatically.

cards.title: Performance Analytics
cards.body: Opens, clicks, conversions, and audience insights — giving SMBs visibility into what works and your team data to drive upsell conversations.

cards.title: Flexible Packaging
cards.body: Sell standalone or bundled with hosting and website design. You set the plans, tiers, and pricing that match your market strategy.

partnerAdvantage.heading: Built for Service Providers. Not Bolted On.
partnerAdvantage.intro: Email marketing that integrates into your ecosystem — not another disconnected SaaS tool for your customers.

items.title: Cross-sell into your base
items.body: Every website and hosting customer is an email marketing prospect. Bundling drives higher attachment rates and reduces churn across your portfolio.

items.title: Launch without complexity
items.body: Automated provisioning through Hostopia's platform. No infrastructure to build, no campaign management to staff, no onboarding bottlenecks.

items.title: Scale revenue, not headcount
items.body: AI handles the heavy lifting for your SMB customers. Automation handles it for your operations team. You grow revenue without growing cost.

lifecycleFit.heading: Email Naturally Fits Your Digital Services Stack
lifecycleFit.intro: When you deliver email marketing through Hostopia, you capture a service your customers are already paying for elsewhere — or missing entirely.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Domains, logo, and professional email establish the SMB identity.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: AI-powered websites and hosting launch their digital presence.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: SEO, directories, and reputation management drive visibility.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Email marketing, ecommerce, and custom development fuel repeat business and growth.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Email naturally bundles with websites, domains, and hosting — increasing product attachment and reducing churn. One dashboard, one provider, one bill.

cta.headline: Ready to Add Email Marketing to Your Digital Services?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch branded email marketing, increase product attachment across your SMB base, and turn a proven channel into scalable recurring revenue.
